title: zannichellia palustris subvar. polycarpa
intro: Zannichellia palustris subvar. polycarpa, commonly known as the hornwort or flowering hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Zannichelliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Zannichellia palustris subvar. polycarpa typically involves drying the plant material and using it in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
